S.FORM: = Tony Tan = Mntucing hngkawas 1940 idas 2 jiyax 7 ka Tony Tan ga, empklawa ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Singapore ta sayang o kiya ka Tony Tan, pnaah hngkawas 2011 idas 9 jiyax 1 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = tonj tan = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * ka tonj tan ga, əmpklawa ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan siŋapoɾə ta sajaŋ o kija ka tonj tan, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
S.FORM: = Tony Tan = Mntucing hngkawas 1940 idas 2 jiyax 7 ka Tony Tan ga, empklawa ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Singapore ta sayang o kiya ka Tony Tan, pnaah hngkawas 2011 idas 9 jiyax 1 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = tonj tan = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * ka tonj tan ga, əmpklawa ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan siŋapoɾə ta sajaŋ o kija ka tonj tan, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
